identity: Human male warrior, mid-30s, long wild red hair and full red beard, blue eyes, stern weathered face, broad barrel-chested build.
outfit: Gray horned viking-style helm over matted red hair, thick gray-brown fur mantle around shoulders, bare muscular arms, drab olive-yellow leather tunic, brown leather straps across chest.
weapons: A single-handed iron war axe with a wooden haft carried across the back, gripped in the right hand during combat.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-swing horizontal axe chop at waist height, right arm extended, left foot planted forward, red hair streaming.
spellStyle: East-facing. Axe raised overhead in right hand, left fist clenched, roaring battle-cry, faint red aura around body.
blockStyle: East-facing. Axe haft held horizontally across the chest in both hands as a guard, chin tucked, shoulders squared.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, axe dropped in the dirt beside him, head bowed, fur mantle slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Axe resting head-down at his side, left hand on hip, horned helm and red beard clearly visible.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Gray horned viking helm, wild red hair and full red beard, fur mantle at shoulders, axe head visible over the right shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male warrior, mid-30s, long wild red hair and full red beard, blue eyes, stern weathered face, broad barrel-chested build.

OUTFIT: Gray horned viking-style helm over matted red hair, thick gray-brown fur mantle around shoulders, bare muscular arms, drab olive-yellow leather tunic, brown leather straps across chest.

WEAPONS: A single-handed iron war axe with a wooden haft carried across the back, gripped in the right hand during combat.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male warrior, mid-30s, long wild red hair and full red beard, blue eyes, stern weathered face, broad barrel-chested build.

OUTFIT: Gray horned viking-style helm over matted red hair, thick gray-brown fur mantle around shoulders, bare muscular arms, drab olive-yellow leather tunic, brown leather straps across chest.

WEAPONS: A single-handed iron war axe with a wooden haft carried across the back, gripped in the right hand during combat.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Gray horned viking helm, wild red hair and full red beard, fur mantle at shoulders, axe head visible over the right shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
